epd_augmentation_role: Use EPD private project generation evidence to triangulate missing or delayed official generation series; do not replace official baseline without validation
Use EPD project-level capacity, COD dates, and private investment records to augment project pipeline and cross-check installed capacity
Use EPD private-sector deal/project data to improve CAPEX/OPEX assumptions and financing benchmarks
Use EPD private procurement/project disclosures to triangulate non-official fuel/cost assumptions
Use EPD private connection/productive-use data to augment demand segmentation and scenario drivers
EPD not baseline source; use only when project documents report technology-specific emissions assumptions
Use EPD pipeline and private resource studies to identify candidate resource constraints for scenarios
EPD is high-value for private-sector project pipeline, ownership, finance, technology, expected COD, and status
